prompt: A highly detailed, whimsical anime cafe illustration in a vertical composition, featuring a chibi girl mascot standing at the center of a cozy fantasy coffee shop during golden sunrise. She has extremely long, voluminous hair with a vivid rainbow gradient that begins as deep blue at the crown and flows through cyan, green, yellow, orange, pink, and purple at the tips, with glossy highlights and thick bangs framing large sparkling blue eyes. She wears oversized silver headphones with green four-leaf clover emblems on both earcups, a red leather jacket, a white T-shirt with a yellow smiley face, fitted blue jeans, and white high-top sneakers with red accents. She smiles warmly and holds a white coffee mug decorated with a green clover symbol. Add a speech bubble near her head containing Japanese text: おはよう。今日も、ひとくち目の幸せから。. The cafe interior is richly decorated with dark polished wood, hanging banners, shelves filled with glass bottles and jars, trailing green plants, glowing crystal ornaments, and warm amber lighting. On the left upper area, hang a blackboard menu sign labeled AriteAL Cafe Menu with Japanese handwritten menu items and small coffee doodles. In the right background, place tall arched windows showing a dreamy pastel sunrise sky and storybook castle-like towers outside. Include exactly 2 mascot creatures: 1 small blue penguin barista on the left beside stacked clover mugs, and 1 small black cat-like creature with tiny bat wings and a red bow tie near a chalkboard sign on the lower right. In the foreground on a round table, show exactly 4 featured food and drink items: 1 thick slice of toast topped with a green clover garnish, 1 cup of latte art coffee in a clover cup, 1 glass jar of honey, and 1 tall rainbow parfait layered with colorful jelly, whipped cream, berries, strawberry slices, and crystal-like candy shards. Also place a teapot and additional clover-pattern cups on side tables in the midground. Add a small standing chalkboard sign on the lower right with Japanese welcome text and the cafe name. The whole image should feel magical, cheerful, polished, and richly rendered, with soft sparkles, warm morning light, saturated colors, intricate decorative details, and premium gpt-image-2 anime illustration quality.
